{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322011838767FE4F565BC0EF15043"}"},"total":1423},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7612029975470719769","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"非常精彩的一部极具巧思的天龙衍生佳作。作者牛斗君以细腻笔触重构经典武侠世界，主角穿越成幼童的设定别出心裁，节奏舒缓却暗藏张力。推荐","text_exts":[{"e":14,"s":12,"text":"天龙","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44&hyperlink_type=quote_book&directQueryWord=%E5%A4%A9%E9%BE%99&directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%2317741135180EF15043%230%23%23&directTabType=0&reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227612029975470719769%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227487473904634563609%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E5%A4%A9%E9%BE%99%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D&halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1772322417,"group_id":"7487473904634563609","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"希望会越来越好","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2Ny51pvtO9fWFlcdcbO69K1s=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/2435784f5c5448aca9b150ac613534c0~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776704260&x-signature=LaRyEpmIVgWemnHc8cmb53x0LNU%3D","user_id":"657985768261028","user_name":"不会写网文的木头"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"657985768261028","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7487473904634563609","book_info":{"abstract":"【天龙+节奏慢+武侠+系统】
陈庆一觉醒来发现自己穿越到了天龙八部世界，王语嫣、阿朱、木婉清……我来了！！！
再仔细一看，自己怎么小胳膊小腿了，老娘的眼神中还带着狠厉。
注意注意：本书是天龙衍生文，借着天龙世界的壳子融入作者自己的想法，结合大宋，大理，西夏，辽国历史争斗，以大宋为主。
文中会有独特的设定，不会按照原著。
例如：康敏会武，一岁多主角不会说话不会跑……不接受就没必要点进去互相碍眼了！？！","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2obbfa05ca76fe6ac7e1c4f6be4c619694~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"牛斗君","author_id":"","book_id":"7487473904634563609","book_name":"我自天龙登顶","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#102020","creation_status":"1","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2万人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":1016,"name":"男频衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1016&name=男频衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":37,"name":"穿越","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=37&name=穿越&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":19,"name":"系统","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=19&name=系统&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":16,"name":"武侠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=16&name=武侠&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":838,"name":"无后宫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=838&name=无后宫&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"},{"category_id":1079,"name":"衍生","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1079&name=衍生&genre_type=0&gender=1&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7499525703432421913","read_count":"19604","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"1507950"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.7","serial_count":"559","tags":"男频衍生,武侠,系统,穿越,无后宫,衍生","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/976b5ea02f2dec6324b70944508a6b21~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779297518&x-signature=sJ2FxtOvf99dbFBkbjeldpTDN1U%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"104543389336","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"56"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"20260322011838767FE4F565BC0EF15043"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读11小时后点评"},"stat":{"digg_coun
